title: inula lanigera
intro: Inula lanigera, also known as Woolly Inula, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects. Inula lanigera is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
